destinations.evidence: The LLM codec decodes the full 30-field ABI and preserves field 29 as a StorageRef while exposing executor, TTL, messages, and model.
Validation consumes the full codec result and still checks executor, TTL, model, and messages.

equivalence_argument: The port rejects truncated or partial LLM payloads by requiring exactly 30 decoded tokens, then validates the same base fields and message/model constraints from that full decode.
notes: This duplicate LLM conversation-history invariant is satisfied by the same 30-field codec and validation path as invariant 522.
rationale: The merge imports StorageRef, changes the decoder from a minimal first-fields parser to a 30-field ABI decoder, adds convo_history to LLMCallRequest, and adds validation and codec tests asserting GCS StorageRef round-trips. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: LLMCallRequest::from_abi must decode the full 30-field LLM request ABI and extract convo_history from field 29 as a StorageRef, while still validating executor, TTL, messages_json, and model from their existing fields.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode a full LLM request with a non-default StorageRef at field 29 and valid model/messages. Assert validate_async_payload accepts it and LLMCallRequest::from_abi returns the same platform, path, and key_ref. Also assert malformed or truncated payloads that do not satisfy the full ABI are rejected.
summary: LLM codec decodes conversation history as a StorageRef.
test_or_falsification_candidate: ABI-encode a full LLM request with a non-default field-29 StorageRef and valid model/messages; assert validation accepts it and LLMCallRequest::from_abi returns the same StorageRef, while truncated payloads fail.
title: LLM codec decodes conversation history StorageRef
